notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the dotnet6.0 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 19 CVEs: CVE-2023-21538, CVE-2023-44487, CVE-2023-24936, CVE-2023-29331, CVE-2023-29337, and 14 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
